zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye於1220年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾武托希特。她於1240年與Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾武托希特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye于1220年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾武托希特。她于1240年与Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye在英国英格兰斯塔福爾武托希特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye was born in 1220, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye in 1240, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye est née en 1220, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye en 1240, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye wurde 1220 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1240 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye è nata il nel 1220 nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye nel 1240, nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleyeは1220年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターで生まれた。1240年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターでSir Hugh de Kynnardsleyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye(은)는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye nasceu em 1220, em Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye em 1240, em Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye родилась в 1220 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye в 1240 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye nació en 1220, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye en 1240, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo.
